raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Over 1,000 pedestrians were killed on California's roads in 2023.",
    "California's pedestrian fatality rate is nearly 25% higher than the national average.",
    "AB 413 aims to reduce preventable traffic collisions by making it easier for road users to see each other at intersections.",
    "Daylighting keeps intersections clear of visual obstructions.",
    "More than 40 states have implemented daylighting laws prior to AB 413.",
    "Roughly a quarter of all traffic fatalities nationwide occur around intersections.",
    "Daylighting is a proven and widely accepted measure to improve road safety.",
    "City officials in Hoboken, New Jersey, have credited daylighting as a crucial factor in curbing traffic fatalities.",
    "New York City has committed to implementing daylighting at 1,000 intersections citywide.",
    "Cities in California, including San Francisco, Alameda, and Fremont, adopted daylighting before AB 413.",
    "AB 413 allows local jurisdictions to issue warnings for violations starting in 2024.",
    "Beginning in 2025, local jurisdictions may issue citations for violations of daylighting zones.",
    "The bill keeps 20 feet of any marked or unmarked crosswalks or 15 feet of crosswalks with curb extensions clear of stopped vehicles.",
    "Daylighting is a proven strategy for making intersections safer for pedestrians, especially children."
  ]
}
```
